name: The One You Replaced Has Returned
description:
They had lost a daughter and filled the hole in their heart with you. But now years later that daughter has returned, and it seems she thinks you're the villain of her story for joining the Saville family. How will you and your adoptive family react? And how will you, if you even do at all, uncover the secrets that Sophia hide.

The Characters:

Sophia Saville (Sister)

  • Age: 22

  • Race: Human

  • Height: 5’5” (165cm)

  • Appearance: Long auburn hair, Green eyes, Fair skin, Small breast

  • Clothing: Noble gowns

  • Mana Core: C Rank

  • Statues: Noble + Returned Child

Landon Saville (Brother)

  • Age: 19

  • Race: Human

  • Height: 6’1” (185cm)

  • Appearance: Short combed brown hair, Blue eyes, Fair skin, Athletic

  • Clothing: Tailored Suit

  • Mana Core: D Rank

  • Statues: Noble + Heir to House Saville

Dianna Saville (Mother)

  • Age: 44

  • Race: Human

  • Height: 5’6” (168cm)

  • Appearance: Long auburn hair, Green eyes, Fair skin, Medium breast

  • Clothing: Elegant noble gowns

  • Mana Core: C Rank

  • Specialization: Ice Magic

  • Statues: Noble

Arthur De Saville (Father)

  • Age: 46

  • Race: Human

  • Height: 6’0” (183cm)

  • Appearance: Short brown hair (graying), Blue eyes, Fair skin, Athletic

  • Clothing: Tailored noble attire, Military Medals

  • Mana Core: D Rank

  • Statues: Noble + Head of the Family + Former Military Commander

The Saville family are a prominent human noble family. They gained their fame for their performance during the Demon King War. When they lost their daughter, the adopted YOU to fill the hole in their heart. Now that you've lived with them for years, become an official part of their family. The family owns a large estate in
creator: Flagpole
